dailyNews.title: Congress gets notice to vacate 24 Akbar Road office completely by March 28: Report
dailyNews.description: The Congress party has been ordered to vacate its long-standing headquarters at 24 Akbar Road by March 28, marking the end of an era. This follows the relocation of its national office to Indira Bhawan, a move rooted in its historical journey since 1978.

dailyNews.title: Quote of the day: Tom Hanks on resilience — ‘This too shall pass’
dailyNews.description: Tom Hanks embodies a steady presence in Hollywood, emphasizing the temporary nature of both success and failure. His wisdom encourages resilience and a grounded perspective, which is vital in high-pressure environments, reminding us that emotional extremes will pass.

dailyNews.title: Iran claims US, Israel hit Bushehr nuclear plant— What's the strategic importance of the facility? | Explained

dailyNews.description: Democrats have vowed to keep forcing votes on the issue as they seek public testimony from administration officials.

dailyNews.title: Oil trades surged before Trump's Iran post. Some experts are suspicious.

dailyNews.title: Denmark’s PM Frederiksen suffers election setback after standing up to Trump over Greenland

dailyNews.title: Venezuela opposition leader María Corina Machado calls for full privatization of oil industry
dailyNews.description: Machado's remarks come as the oil industry remains hesitant to invest in Venezuela after the U.S. ousted former President Nicolas Maduro.

dailyNews.description: Trump said he decided to back off from his recent threat to order strikes on Iranian energy infrastructure "based on the fact we're negotiating."

dailyNews.title: President Trump to deploy more than 1,000 additional troops
dailyNews.description: Sources tell NBC News that President Trump will send more than an additional 1,000 soldiers from the 82nd Airborne to the Middle East. NBC News’ Chief Foreign Correspondent Richard Engel reports.
